Description: Primary key — unique identifier for each arrest/surrender event
FK → CaseMaster.CaseMasterID — FIR/case linked to this arrest/surrender
Type of event: arrest or voluntary surrender (lookup value)
FK → State.StateID — state where arrest/surrender occurred
FK → District.DistrictID — district where arrest/surrender occurred
FK → Unit.UnitID — police station handling the arrest
FK → Employee.EmployeeID — Investigating Officer who made the arrest
FK → Court.CourtID — court before which accused was produced
FK → Accused.AccusedMasterID — accused person linked to this arrest/surrender
Flag (0/1): whether the person is the primary accused in the case
Flag (0/1): whether the complainant is also listed as accused
